title: Trends
subtitle: Aggregated, anonymized view of patients who opted in to statistical use.
privacyBanner: This data is fully anonymized: it includes only patients who consented, is aggregated by city, state and age band, and groups with fewer than 5 people are hidden to prevent re-identification. No individual data is shown.
emptyDesc: Trends appear once there are at least 5 consented patients in the same group (city + state + age band).
